findings.message: Source file apps/docs/.gitignore was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/LICENSE was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/docs/features/api-configuration-profiles.mdx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/docs/features/auto-approving-actions.mdx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/docs/features/code-actions.mdx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/docs/features/codebase-indexing.mdx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/docs/features/marketplace.mdx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/docs/features/slash-commands.mdx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/docs/index.mdx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/docs/tutorial-videos.json was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/docs/tutorial-videos.mdx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/eslint.config.mjs was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/package.json was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/components/Codicon.tsx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/components/CopyPageURL/index.tsx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/components/GitHubInstallButtons/styles.module.css was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/components/KangarooIcon.tsx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/components/NavbarSocialIcons/styles.module.css was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/components/ProviderTable/index.tsx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/constants.ts was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/theme/DocItem/Content/index.tsx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/theme/DocItem/index.js was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/theme/Footer/Links/MultiColumn/index.tsx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/theme/Footer/Logo/styles.module.css was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/theme/MDXComponents.ts was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/theme/MDXContent/index.tsx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/theme/Navbar/Content/styles.module.css was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/theme/Navbar/MobileSidebar/Toggle/index.tsx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/theme/Navbar/Search/styles.module.css was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/theme/Navbar/index.tsx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/theme/NavbarItem/NavbarNavLink.tsx was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/src/types/react-inert.d.ts was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/static/CNAME was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/static/img/roo-code-logo-white.svg was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/static/ui/arrow-left.svg was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/static/ui/x.svg was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

findings.message: Source file apps/docs/tsconfig.json was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.

pr.title: Add docs app and GitHub Pages deploy
pr.body:
## Summary
- import the cleaned Docusaurus docs app from Roo-Code-Docs PR #553 into apps/docs
- configure docs for https://roocode.github.io with a CNAME and root baseUrl
- add a GitHub Pages workflow that builds and deploys apps/docs
- add docs workspace dependencies and Turbo build inputs

## Verification
- pnpm --filter @roo-code/docs check-types
- pnpm --filter @roo-code/docs lint
- pnpm --filter @roo-code/docs build
- pnpm turbo build --filter @roo-code/docs
- pre-commit hook: pnpm lint
- pre-push hook: pnpm check-types

## Notes
- GitHub Pages still needs the repo settings configured to use GitHub Actions as the Pages source, and the roocode.github.io domain may need to be accepted/configured in GitHub Pages settings.

<!-- roo-code-cloud-preview-start -->
[Interactively review PR in Roo Code Cloud](https://app.roocode.com/preview?repo=RooCodeInc%2FRoo-Code&sha=7ff11481c07381bdd47415f066c240e6af83f4af&pr=12344&branch=codex%2Fimport-docs-pages)
<!-- roo-code-cloud-preview-end -->
pr.author: brunobergher
